zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Geoffrey Boleyn I於1380年出生在英國諾福爾可薩勒時，他的父親Sir Thomas Boleyn30歲，母親Ann Jane Brachton26歲。他於1400年與Lady Alice Bracton在英國英格蘭諾福爾可薩勒結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1440年3月25日在英國諾福爾可享年60歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可薩勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Geoffrey Boleyn I于1380年出生在英国諾福爾可薩勒时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Boleyn30岁，母亲Ann Jane Brachton26岁。他于1400年与Lady Alice Bracton在英国英格兰諾福爾可薩勒结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1440年3月25日在英国諾福爾可享年60岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可薩勒。

nameMeanings.name: Boleyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Bullen  .
Flemish: derivative of the personal name Bol, from Baldwin .

variants.name: Bullen
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from the French Channel port of Boulogne, recorded in Latin sources both as Gessoriacum and as Bononia. The latter name is clearly the source of the modern placename. It is ostensibly a derivative of Latin bonus ‘good’ (compare Bolognese ), but may in fact come from a Gaulish element bona ‘foundation’. Boulogne has long been a major trading port between England and France.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Geoffrey Boleyn I was born in 1380, in Salle, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir Thomas Boleyn, was 30 and his mother, Ann Jane Brachton, was 26. He married Lady Alice Bracton in 1400, in Salle, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 March 1440, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Salle, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Geoffrey Boleyn I est né en 1380, à Salle, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Boleyn, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Ann Jane Brachton, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice Bracton en 1400, à Salle, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 mars 1440, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Salle, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Geoffrey Boleyn I 1380 in Salle, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Boleyn 30 und seine Mutter Ann Jane Brachton 26. Er hat 1400 in Salle, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Lady Alice Bracton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. März 1440 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Norfolk, England und wurde in Salle, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Geoffrey Boleyn I è nato il nel 1380 nel Salle, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Boleyn, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Ann Jane Brachton, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice Bracton nel 1400, nel Salle, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 marzo 1440, nel Norfolk, England, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Salle, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey Boleyn Iが1380年にイギリスノーフォルクサルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Boleynは30歳，母Ann Jane Brachtonは26歳であった。1400年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクサルでLady Alice Bractonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1440年3月25日にイギリスノーフォルクで60歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey Boleyn I(이)가 1380년 영국 노르폴크 샐일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Boleyn(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Jane Brachton(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 샐일에서 Lady Alice Bracton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1440년 3월 25일 영국 노르폴크에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 샐일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Geoffrey Boleyn I nasceu em 1380, em Salle, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Boleyn, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Ann Jane Brachton, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice Bracton em 1400, em Salle, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de março de 1440, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Salle, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Geoffrey Boleyn I родился в 1380 г. в местности салл, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Boleyn было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Jane Brachton, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice Bracton в 1400 г. в местности салл, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 марта 1440 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности салл, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Geoffrey Boleyn I nació en 1380, en Salle, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Boleyn, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Ann Jane Brachton, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Lady Alice Bracton en 1400, en Salle, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de marzo de 1440, en Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Salle, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
